title: Reconcile orphaned Bureau workspace state safely
goal: Detect workspace rows that remain active after terminal or orphaned runs and produce a reviewed reconciliation path.

acceptance.assertion: Doctor reports active workspace rows whose run is terminal, missing or orphaned.
Cleanup refuses dirty, foreign-owned or still-running workspaces.
State normalization and filesystem cleanup are separate reviewed actions with evidence and rollback.
Run and workspace history remains auditable after reconciliation.

metadata.source: Bureau total audit and Truth Model v2 design
